name: Example Negative Shield
description: Example item: blocks the next matching negative effect.

name: Example Double Roll Uses
description: Example item: your next 6 /dice uses roll twice.

name: Example Double Roll Duration
description: Example item: /dice rolls twice for 5 minutes.

name: Example Trigger Random Event
description: Example item: tries to spawn a random group event immediately.

name: Example Auto Roll Session
description: Example item: rolls for you every 5 seconds for 5 minutes.

name: Example Cleanse Negative Effects
description: Example item: removes active negative effects and clears lockout.
